verdict: Strong React and AI-tooling match; light on Webflow and Shopify.
strengths: Built and shipped a full React + Tailwind app (Kindred Paws)
Created a company-wide Claude automation toolkit, strong prompt engineering
gaps: No production Webflow or Shopify experience yet
GSAP / Framer Motion not on the resume
tailoredIntro: A 3 to 4 sentence cover-letter opener written in the candidate's voice, specific and confident, no cliches and no em dashes.
